hero_subheadline: Automate your workflow and focus on what truly matters with Productivity Pro

benefits.title: Smart Automation
benefits.description: Set your rules once, and let the app handle repetitive tasks automatically. No more manual work.

benefits.title: Sync Everywhere
benefits.description: Real-time synchronization across phone, tablet, and desktop keeps everything up-to-date instantly.

benefits.title: Team Ready
benefits.description: Share tasks, collaborate seamlessly, and keep your team aligned without complexity.

benefits.title: Stay Focused
benefits.description: Smart notifications ensure you're never distracted while staying fully informed of what matters.

social_proof_reviews.text: This app completely transformed how I organize my work. Highly recommend!
Best productivity app I've ever used. The automation features save me hours daily.

faq_items.question: How does the automation work?
faq_items.answer: Simply define your rules (when X happens, do Y) and the app handles everything automatically in the background 24/7.

faq_items.question: Is my data secure?
faq_items.answer: Yes, we use military-grade encryption and comply with GDPR, CCPA, and international data protection standards.

faq_items.question: Can multiple team members use it?
faq_items.answer: Absolutely. Create teams, assign tasks, set permissions, and collaborate in real-time across your organization.
